name: MenuComponent
description: The component that represents a menu.

inputs.name: additionalBodyClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS classes for the menu body container

inputs.name: appendTo
inputs.description: The element to which the menu overlay is attached

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Aria-label for navigation

inputs.name: ariaLabelledby
inputs.description: Aria-Labelledby for element describing navigation

inputs.name: closeOnEscapeKey
inputs.description: Whether to close menu on escape key

inputs.name: closeOnNavigation
inputs.description: Whether to close the menu on router navigation start

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether to close on outside click

inputs.name: config
inputs.description:
Configuration object for popover settings.
When provided, these settings will be merged with individual input properties.
Individual inputs take precedence over config object values.

inputs.name: disableScrollbar
inputs.description: Whether to disable scrollbar

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the menu is disabled

inputs.name: fillControlMode
inputs.description:
Preset options for the menu body width.
* `at-least` will apply a minimum width to the body equivalent to the width of the control.
* `equal` will apply a width to the body equivalent to the width of the control.
* Leave blank for no effect.

inputs.name: fixedPosition
inputs.description: Whether position shouldn't change when the menu approaches the corner of the page

inputs.name: focusAutoCapture
inputs.description: Whether to auto-capture focus when opened

inputs.name: focusTrapped
inputs.description: Whether the menu should trap focus within its boundaries

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Id of the control.

inputs.name: isOpen
inputs.description: Two-way binding for menu open state

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Whether the menu should be displayed in mobile mode

inputs.name: mobileConfig
inputs.description: Mobile mode configuration

inputs.name: noArrow
inputs.description: Whether to hide the arrow

inputs.name: openOnHoverTime
inputs.description: Open submenu on hover after given milliseconds

inputs.name: placement
inputs.description: Menu placement

inputs.name: restoreFocusOnClose
inputs.description: Whether to move focus back to the trigger after the menu is closed

inputs.name: triggers
inputs.description: Trigger events for opening/closing

outputs.name: activePath
outputs.description: Emits array of active menu items

outputs.name: beforeOpen
outputs.description: Event emitted right before the menu is being opened.

outputs.name: isOpenChange
outputs.description: Two-way binding for menu open state

outputs.name: isOpenChange
outputs.description: Emits when menu open state changes - required for MenuInterface compatibility

methods.name: refreshPosition
methods.description: Method called to refresh position of opened menu
